findings.description: 19.0.0 released 4.5 months after 18.0.0 (2025-11-18). This TypeSpec migration is a major version bump within 6 months.

notes: TypeSpec migration from Swagger (18.0.0 used @azure/core-client, 19.0.0 uses @azure-rest/core-client). ADO CI failed on windows_20x_browser build. No naming issues (_N, AutoGenerated), no unknown/void concerns, versions aligned across package.json/context/CHANGELOG.
